zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Wyndham於1410年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可維蒙達哈姆時，他的父親John Wymondham31歲，母親Margaret Seagrave40歲。他於1440年7月12日之前與Margery Clifton結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1475年6月4日在英國諾福爾可享年65歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可諾維其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Wyndham于1410年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可維蒙達哈姆时，他的父亲John Wymondham31岁，母亲Margaret Seagrave40岁。他于1440年7月12日之前与Margery Clifton结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1475年6月4日在英国諾福爾可享年65岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可諾維其。

nameMeanings.name: Wyndham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Windham  .

variants.name: Windham
meanings: English: habitational name usually from the Norfolk placename Wymondham, which is locally pronounced /wɪndəm/. The placename probably derives from the Old English personal name Wīgmund + Old English hām ‘village, homestead’. By various marriages in the 16th century the Wyndham family of Felbrigg Hall, Norfolk, acquired estates in North Yorkshire and Somerset, for which reason the manor of Orchard in the parish of Watchet, came to be known as Orchard Wyndham in the early 17th century. Later descendants became earls of Egremont, whose estates included Petworth in Sussex. This and other marital acquistions probably explain the post-medieval presence of the surname in Somerset, Devon, Dorset, Wiltshire, Gloucestershire, northern England, and perhaps also (from the late 17th century) in Sussex and Kent. In 1741 Percy Wyndham of the Orchard family inherited the earldom of Thomond, in Ireland, which may account for the currency of the name in Connaght (see 4 below).

English: habitational name perhaps occasionally from Wymondham in Leicestershire. The placename derives from the Old English personal name Wīgmund (genitive Wīgmundes) + Old English hām ‘village, homestead’.
English: habitational name from Wyndham in Shermanbury (Sussex). The placename derives from an Old English personal name Winda + Old English hamm ‘water meadow’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Wyndham was born in 1410, in Wymondham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Wymondham, was 31 and his mother, Margaret Seagrave, was 40. He married Margery Clifton before 12 July 1440. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 4 June 1475, in Norfolk, England, at the age of 65, and was buried in Norwich, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Wyndham est né en 1410, à Wymondham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Wymondham, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Margaret Seagrave, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Margery Clifton avant 12 juillet 1440. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 4 juin 1475, à Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Wyndham 1410 in Wymondham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Wymondham 31 und seine Mutter Margaret Seagrave 40. Er hat vor 12. Juli 1440 Margery Clifton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 4. Juni 1475 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Norfolk, England und wurde in Norwich, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Wyndham è nato il nel 1410 nel Wymondham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Wymondham, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Seagrave, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Margery Clifton prima del 12 luglio 1440. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 4 giugno 1475, nel Norfolk, England, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a Norwich, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Wyndhamが1410年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクウイモンドハムで生まれた時，父John Wymondhamは31歳，母Margaret Seagraveは40歳であった。1440年7月12日以前にMargery Cliftonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1475年6月4日にイギリスノーフォルクで65歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクノーウィチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Wyndham(이)가 1410년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 윈이몽함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Wymondham(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Seagrave(은)는 40세였다. 그는 1440년 7월 12일 이전 Margery Clifton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1475년 6월 4일 영국 노르폴크에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 노위치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Wyndham nasceu em 1410, em Wymondham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Wymondham, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Seagrave, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery Clifton antes 12 de julho de 1440. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 4 de junho de 1475, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Wyndham родился в 1410 г. в местности вимондхам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Wymondham было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Seagrave, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery Clifton перед 12 июля 1440 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 4 июня 1475 г. в местности норфолк, Англия в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности норвич, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Wyndham nació en 1410, en Wymondham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Wymondham, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Margaret Seagrave, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Margery Clifton antes de 12 de julio de 1440. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 4 de junio de 1475, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
